name: Dried Fig & Apricot Stuffing
recipeIngredient: 5 cups Country-style bread (in slices or chunks)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the bread: Use hard, dry baguette, pain au levain, Italian slipper bread, or any combination of country-style bread, or leftovers from homemade bread.
2. Melt butter in a small saucepan. Add onions and garlic, and sauté until translucent (about 3-4 minutes).
3. Add boiling water to the pan and pour over the bread. Turn the pieces to ensure they are all soaked. Let stand for 10-15 minutes, or until the bread is cool enough to handle and the water has been absorbed.
4. Squeeze the bread in your hands to form a thick paste. Add fruits, herbs, salt, and pepper; continue squeezing to incorporate them into the paste.
5. The stuffing yields about 3 cups, sufficient for stuffing a 7-pound turkey breast or a 12- to 14-pound turkey.
